summary: Qwen3.7 Max announced at Alibaba Cloud Summit — 1M context (up from 256K), $2.50/$7.50 per Mtok, API-only.

analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: The context-window jump from 256K to 1M brings Qwen's flagship in line with Claude Opus and GPT-5.5, at roughly half the input price of either. Unlike the numbered Qwen checkpoints, Max stays closed-weight and API-only — Alibaba is running the same split strategy as Meta abandoned: open weights for the community tier, proprietary for the frontier tier. Worth watching whether the 35-hour continuous agent run claim from the launch demo holds up under independent testing.
